game_info.title: Game Dev Tycoon
game_info.concept:
In Game Dev Tycoon you replay the history of the gaming industry by starting your own video game development company in the 80s. Create best selling games. Research new technologies and invent new game types. Become the leader of the market and gain worldwide fans. In Game Dev Tycoon you replay the history of the gaming industry by starting your own video game development company in the 80s. Create best selling games. Research new technologies and invent new game types. Become the leader of the market and gain worldwide fans.

A journey through gaming history


Start in the 80s
Start your adventure in a small garage office in the 80s. Enjoy the hand-crafted level design while you develop your first simple games. Gain experience, unlock new options and create your first game engine.

Create games your way
In Game Dev Tycoon the decisions you make during development really matter. Decide which areas you want to focus on. Does your game need more gameplay or should you focus more on quests? These decisions will have a major impact on the success of your game.

Grow your company
Once you have successfully released a few games you can move into your own office and forge a world-class development team. Hire staff, train them and unlock new options.

Make larger more complex games
With experience and a good team, you can release larger, more complex games. Larger games bring new challenges and you will have to manage your team well to deliver hit games.

Features


  • Start a game development company in the 80s
  • Design and create games
  • Gain new insights through game reports
  • Research new technologies
  • Create custom game engines
  • Move into bigger offices
  • Forge a world-class development team
  • Unlock secret labs
  • Conduct industry changing projects
  • Unlock achievements
  • Modding support
  • Workshop support
  • Community translations for German, Spanish, French, Portuguese (Brazil), Russian, Czech, Swedish, Dutch and Italian are available through the in-game menu.

The full game has many more features which are not listed here to prevent spoilers.
game_info.description: Build your game development empire from a humble garage in the 1980s! Create and release games, research new technologies, and grow your company. Balance your resources between Design, Tech, and Marketing to create hit games. Earn money, unlock new game types, and compete against rival companies to become the industry leader. Win by reaching $50,000 and maintaining your reputation!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Up/Down: Navigate menu options
Space: Select menu option / Confirm action
Z: Fast-forward time during development
Shift: View detailed stats (hold)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (from game over screen)
Enter: Start game (from start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game navigation and interaction with the menu system. Validates that the player can navigate through different game phases, select options, and trigger game state changes correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through menu options using arrow keys, select actions with space bar, and verify that game state updates appropriately. Test creating games with different focus allocations and ensure the development cycle completes.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully navigates menus, creates games, and completes at least one full game development cycle. Game state should update correctly with proper phase transitions and no errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal strategy to win the game by reaching $50,000 with good reputation. This validates that the win condition is achievable and that the game balance allows for victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Create games strategically by balancing Design, Tech, and Marketing investments. Research new technologies when affordable. Focus on creating successful games that build reputation and generate revenue. Optimize decisions based on available budget and market trends.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully reach $50,000 in money while maintaining positive reputation. The game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. The strategy should achieve victory within a reasonable timeframe demonstrating the game is winnable.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests the game over lose condition by making poor decisions that lead to bankruptcy or loss of reputation. Validates that losing conditions are implemented correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Make suboptimal game development choices such as minimal investment in all areas, or overspending without building a revenue base. Continue until bankruptcy or reputation drops too low.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE state when money runs out or reputation becomes critically low. Proper game over screen is displayed with restart option.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests the research system and technology progression. Validates that researching new technologies unlocks new game types and improves capabilities.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Accumulate enough money to research technologies. Test unlocking different game types and engines. Verify that research costs scale appropriately and new options become available.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Technologies are successfully researched when conditions are met. New game types and options unlock. Research investments properly deduct money and update available choices.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests the game creation cycle and scoring system. Validates that games are rated based on the allocation of Design, Tech, and Marketing points.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Games receive appropriate review scores based on allocation choices. Sales revenue is calculated correctly. Reputation increases with successful games and decreases with failures. Money updates reflect sales and costs.
